## ResolveScopeKeyParams

<GenerationInfo sourceFile="packages/ratelimit/src/utils/keys.ts" sourceLine="23" packageName="@commandkit/ratelimit" />

Inputs for resolving a scope-based key from a command/source.

```ts title="Signature"
interface ResolveScopeKeyParams {
    ctx: Context;
    source: Interaction | Message;
    command: LoadedCommand;
    scope: RateLimitScope;
    keyPrefix?: string;
    keyResolver?: RateLimitKeyResolver;
}
```
